name: WindowManager
desc: Snaps windows to the left or right half of the screen.

items.name: snapLeft
items.desc: Snaps the focused window to the left half of the current screen.

items.name: snapRight
items.desc: Snaps the focused window to the right half of the current screen.

items.name: bindHotkeys
parameters: * mapping - A table where keys are action names ("left", "right") and values are hotkey specs (e.g. `{"ctrl", "opt"}, "left"`)

items.name: start
items.desc: Starts the Spoon (nothing to do as hotkeys are handled via bindHotkeys).
